name: Mayonnaise Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the raisins, nuts, soda, and hot water in a bowl and allow to soak for 10 minutes.
2. In another bowl, blend together the mayonnaise, sugar, vanilla extract, cloves, and cinnamon until smooth.
3. Gradually fold the dry mixture (flour) into the wet mixture, alternating between the two mixtures.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until the cake is cooked through when tested with a toothpick.
6. Yield: One 9-inch square cake.
